positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration of a group of interconnected, abstract celestial bodies: crescent moons, sparkling constellations, and bioluminescent cosmic dust, forming a gentle spiral nebula pattern. The composition should be centrally focused, utilizing a deep midnight blue and ethereal lavender color palette, accented by sharp, metallic gold lines and pops of bright cyan. The style should be a mix of modern vector art and intricate stained glass motifs, allowing for clean, defined silhouettes perfect for apparel printing. The contrast must be high, making the glowing elements pop against the dark background. Minimalist detail, maximum impact. No clutter.
